features.name: Public GitHub Issues intake
features.summary: Issue forms for requests, bugs, and vote nominations.

features.name: Issue reaction voting
features.summary: Reaction weights and Friday scoring are documented and scriptable.

features.name: GitHub Pages static site
features.summary: Static site renders areas, requests, Friday Top 5, and Approved Now.
features.claim_boundary: Site deployment not claimed until Pages settings and Actions evidence exist.

features.name: N-Suite overlay read plan
features.summary: Overlay reads public JSON only and exposes open/copy/display actions.
